name: @tootallnate/unity-asset
description: Parser for Unity SerializedFile assets (the `CAB-…` files inside an AssetBundle / UnityFS bundle). Decodes the on-disk header, the type table, and — when the bundle ships a TypeTree — the per-object payload into a typed JSON-shaped value. Surfaces Texture2D objects with a streaming pixel-data accessor pointing at the matching `.resS` resource stream so callers can hand the bytes off to a texture decoder.
author: Nathan Rajlich <n@n8.io>
